```{r}
# Per-cell slide-tags exploration utilities. Each function lives in its own file
# under r_utils/; source them all here. .get_cell_row / .prom_region_fit are
# shared helpers used by the plotting functions.
r_utils <- "/n/data1/hms/scrb/chen/lab/bco/pipelines/slide-tags/r_utils"
invisible(lapply(list.files(r_utils, pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE), source))

# other shared Rmd helper libraries (rmd() is defined in r_utils/rmd.R)
rmd("i")
rmd("save_plt")
rmd("plot_log_hex_scat")
```

```{r}
# scratch space — load a run and explore:
#   bead   <- read.csv(".../cell-barcode_coords.csv", check.names = FALSE)
#   prof   <- read.csv(".../cell_coords.csv",         check.names = FALSE)
#   cid    <- paste0(prof$cb[1], "-1")
#   puck_cb_scatter(cid, bead)
#   puck_cb_promrank(cid, prof)
#   puck_c1_intden(cid, prof)
#   puck_cb_kde_3d(cid, bead)
#   promrank_bg_dist(paste0(head(prof$cb, 50), "-1"), prof)
```
